title: Refitter Settings
description: Schema for the .refitter configuration file that controls how Refitter generates Refit HTTP client interfaces from OpenAPI specifications.

openApiPath.description: Path or URL to the OpenAPI specification file. Supports local file paths and HTTP(S) URLs.

namespace.description: The C# namespace for generated code.

naming.description: Naming convention configuration for generated types.

useOpenApiTitle.description: Use the OpenAPI title as the namespace when true.

outputFilename.description: Name of the generated output file.

returnIApiResponse.description: When true, generated methods return IApiResponse<T> for access to response metadata.

generateContracts.description: Whether to generate contract model classes alongside the Refit interfaces.

generateXmlDocCodeComments.description: Whether to include XML documentation comments on generated members.

addAutoGeneratedHeader.description: Add an auto-generated code header comment to output files.

addAcceptHeaders.description: Add Accept headers to GET methods.

useCancellationTokens.description: Include CancellationToken parameters in generated methods.

contractsOutputFolder.description: Separate output folder for generated contract/model classes.

multipleInterfaces.description: Strategy for splitting output into multiple interfaces.

includePathMatches.description: Regex patterns for API paths to include in generation.

excludePathMatches.description: Regex patterns for API paths to exclude from generation.

useDynamicQuerystringParameters.description: Use dynamic query string parameter objects.
